#nullable enable

using System.Collections.Generic;
using Hexalith.FrontComposer.Contracts.Registration;

namespace TestDomain;

/// <summary>
/// Domain registration for <see cref="OrderProjection"/> in the "Orders" bounded context.
/// </summary>
public static class OrderProjectionRegistration
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the domain manifest describing this projection's bounded context.
    /// </summary>
    public static DomainManifest Manifest { get; } = new DomainManifest(
        Name: "Orders",
        BoundedContext: "Orders",
        Projections: new List<string> { typeof(OrderProjection).FullName! },
        Commands: new List<string>());

    /// <summary>
    /// Registers this projection's domain metadata with the composition registry.
    /// </summary>
    /// <param name="registry">The front composer registry.</param>
    public static void RegisterDomain(IFrontComposerRegistry registry)
    {
        registry.RegisterDomain(Manifest);
    }
}
